{{Infobox character
| name = Heartlander man
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Heartlander man]] wearing golden silk and a [[steel blindfold]] appears.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
